# SQLRooms

> Build data-centric apps with DuckDB

An open source React toolkit for human + agent collaborative analytics apps

## Table of Contents

### Introduction

- [Overview](/overview.md)
- [Key Concepts](/key-concepts.md)
- [Modular Architecture](/modular-architecture.md)
- [What's New](/whats-new.md)
- [Upgrade Guide](/upgrade-guide.md)

- [Getting Started with SQLRooms](/getting-started.md)
- [State Management](/state-management.md)
- [Query Cancellation in DuckDbConnector](/query-cancellation.md)
- [Theming](/theming.md)
- [Offline Use](/offline-use.md)

### Examples

- [Example Applications](/examples.md)
- [Case Studies](/case-studies.md)
